description: Style NoteUnderstated yet elegant, this pair of designer button covers from belmonte offers a refined finish to a formal shirt. This small accessory which clips onto your button has a big impact on the look of a suit; a perfect accompaniment to your outfit when you want the appearance of cufflinks but the convenience of buttons. Product Details Round cuff links made of steel, with textured metallic design Designed clasp at the back to hold the cuff link in place Size Width: 1.5 cm
